posts.author: ElenaCrafts
posts.text: Just finished my first attempt at felting a small pouch! I used leftover wool scraps and it turned out better than I expected. So proud of myself for trying something new.
posts.explanation: This is a harmless personal update about a hobby and creative achievement, containing no threats, private information or harmful content.

posts.author: MeadowWalker84
posts.text: Honestly, I'm tired of the noise at Westbridge Council meetings lately. They keep talking about 'balancing budgets' while ignoring real issues like housing and transport. It feels like they're more concerned with optics than actual progress. #localpolitics
posts.explanation: This is a standard opinion post criticising government policy without containing threats, harassment, or harmful misinformation; it falls within acceptable free speech.
